free_text: High-resolution study of four-nucleon pickup via the
(d,3-Li-6) reaction at E(d)=55 MeV on sd shell nuclei.
The total energy resolution of about 40 keV at forward
angles was mainly determined by the target thickness
and was found to be somewhat better for the aluminium
target than for the magnesium target in agreement with
the smaller thickness of the aluminium target. Due to
kinematic effects the energy resolution was 60-80 keV
a combination of a drift chamber and a resistive wire
Spectra for the (d,Li-6) reaction of Mg-24 and Mg-26
. The estimated error in the absolute cross
sections is 20%, which is mainly due to uncertainties
.The uncertainty is reported by authors on
